title: Dicraeia wightii

The classification of Dicraeia wightii is further detailed by its kingdom placement, which is Plantae.

intro: Dicraeia wightii, also known as 'Kallu' or 'Tulsi of the Hills', is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Asparagaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, respiratory problems, and digestive disorders.
